title: Klaviyo vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Klaviyo vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Klaviyo and Loops comes down to your specific use case. Klaviyo is built for e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-Commerce Brands On Shopify Or Woocommerce
comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Klaviyo wins for e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Loops?
faq.a: Klaviyo starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
